title: Booked Meeting in Concierge
description: Booked a meeting with consultant in the Conversation.

xdm:consultantEmail.title: Consultant Email
xdm:consultantEmail.description: Email address of the sales representative. Enables automated notifications and calendar integration.

xdm:consultantName.title: Consultant Name
xdm:consultantName.description: Name of the sales representative with whom the meeting is scheduled. Enables sales team tracking and performance measurement.

xdm:scheduledFor.title: Scheduled At
xdm:scheduledFor.description: Scheduled start time of the meeting

xdm:routingType.title: Routing Type
xdm:routingType.description: Routing type used for the meeting

xdm:durationInMinutes.title: Meeting Duration
xdm:durationInMinutes.description: Duration of the scheduled meeting in minutes. Helps in calendar scheduling and time allocation.

xdm:createdAt.title: Created Date
xdm:createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the meeting was booked. Enables tracking of booking patterns and conversion timing.

xdm:comments.title: Meeting Comments
xdm:comments.description: Comments from the meeting. Sales rep captures the context that can be used for other channels.
